Container.Name: OpenRepo
Container.Overview:
OpenRepo is a web-based repository server designed for managing and hosting package repositories for Debian (.deb), RedHat (.rpm), and generic files. It features user access control, PGP signing key management, packages promotion, a REST API, and a CLI client.
This unRaid template runs Nginx, Django, and the background worker in a single self-contained container using SQLite as the default database.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Web Interface Port. Access the web dashboard here.

Config.Name: Appdata Directory
Config.Description: Path to save persistent application data, database (SQLite), keys, and repository packages.

Config.Name: Database Type
Config.Description: The database engine to use. Choose 'sqlite' for a self-contained installation (recommended for this single container setup) or 'postgresql' to use an external PostgreSQL database.

Config.Name: Django Secret Key
Config.Description: REQUIRED: generate a unique secret per install (openssl rand -hex 64). Do not reuse a published/default value — it signs sessions and CSRF tokens.

Config.Name: Domain Name
Config.Description: Domain name or host IP:Port where the instance is accessible (e.g. repo.example.com or 192.168.1.100:7376). Must match the published Web UI port.

Config.Name: CSRF Trusted Origins
Config.Description: Space-separated list of trusted origins for CSRF security when running behind a reverse proxy (e.g., https://repo.example.com).

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Loglevel for the Django application (INFO, DEBUG, WARNING, ERROR).

Config.Name: Debug Mode
Config.Description: Set to TRUE to enable Django debug logging and pages (not recommended for production).

Config.Name: RPM Version Ignore Build Number
Config.Description: Set to true if you want to ignore build numbers when managing RPM packages.

Config.Name: Database Host
Config.Description: The hostname or IP of the external PostgreSQL database server (required if Database Type is set to postgresql).

Config.Name: Database Port
Config.Description: The port of the external PostgreSQL database server.

Config.Name: Database Name
Config.Description: The name of the database on the PostgreSQL server.

Config.Name: Database Username
Config.Description: The username to connect to the PostgreSQL server.

Config.Name: Database Password
Config.Description: The password to connect to the PostgreSQL server.
